global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on hotels and flights.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'CloudRoute' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Last-minute savings' in a prominent position at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Additional details
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap', providing more information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Start now' in a clear, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.
